# The Presbyterian Academy

> A PC(USA) Reformed school of theological formation for adult lay leaders. This
> file orients AI crawlers to the site's key pages. Regenerate after content
> changes with `npm run llms:full`.

## Key pages
- [Courses](https://www.presbyterianacademy.org/courses/): The course catalog, browsable by topic and teacher
- [Faculty](https://www.presbyterianacademy.org/faculty/): The ministers and scholars who teach
- [About](https://www.presbyterianacademy.org/about/): Mission, Reformed identity, and what we believe
- [Pricing & Scholarships](https://www.presbyterianacademy.org/pricing/): Tuition, said plainly, and scholarships
- [Get Started](https://www.presbyterianacademy.org/get-started/): Request information or book a free intro
- [For You](https://www.presbyterianacademy.org/for-you/): Find a starting point for where you are
- [Events](https://www.presbyterianacademy.org/events/): Info sessions, open lectures, and term dates
- [Resources](https://www.presbyterianacademy.org/resources/): Teaching and formation essays
- [Contact](https://www.presbyterianacademy.org/contact/): Address, office hours, who to reach
